title: Energy Solution Preparation for OnePot PURE Cell-Free System
author: Konstantinos Ragios
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8ayhsfw

steps.title: For a 2
steps.instruction: For a 2.5x Energy Solution add the materials needed tho a tube. The final concentration of the components is presented in Table 1. Before adding each component make sure it is totally melted and then vortex for a few seconds

steps.title: %s %s Because tRNA degrades over...
steps.instruction: %s %s Because tRNA degrades over time before adding it to the solution you need to check the A 260 units.

steps.title: To complete the solution add biDistilled...
steps.instruction: To complete the solution add biDistilled water until you reach the desirable volume, and then vortex for a few seconds

steps.title: The Energy solution is stored at -80 o C
steps.instruction: The Energy solution is stored at -80 o C.
